document.title: PiRC - Section 4: Allocation Period (Design Option 2)
document.description: LP formation using both deposit and swap operations

T.name: Total Ecosystem Token Allocation
T.description: Total ecosystem-token amount available through the launchpad for this project (launch allocation). Includes tokens purchased by Pioneers and tokens in the Liquidity Pool.

C.name: Total Pi Committed
C.description: Total Pi committed by participants to purchase tokens of a project.

p_list.name: Listing Price
p_list.description: Listing price in Pi per token.

fixed_price_portion.destination: Sold at Listing Price to Pioneers

bucket_A.label: Bucket A - Fixed Price (Step 1)
bucket_A.purpose: Direct purchase of 20% of T at listing price

steps.name: Fixed-Price Delivery
steps.description: Half of total committed Pi (C/2) is transferred to the Escrow Wallet and directly buys 20% of the launch token allocation (0.2T) at the listing price.

steps.name: Escrow Deposit and Pool Creation
steps.description: Pi from Step 1 (C/2) is paired with 80% of the launch token allocation (0.8T) and deposited into the LP by the Escrow Wallet. Escrow Wallet is then permanently locked.

initial_spot_price.description: Initial spot price of the LP is 1/4 of the listing price

escrow_lockup.action: Escrow Wallet signing authority removed to 0
escrow_lockup.reason: Ensures no one can withdraw the initial liquidity used to seed the pool

steps.name: Automated Engagement-Based Swaps
steps.description: Participants swap the second C/2 from LP, ordered by Engagement Score (highest first). Higher engagement = lower effective price = longer lockup.
steps.ranking_basis: Engagement Score measured during Participation Window
steps.lp_access: Restricted to sequenced engagement-based swaps only. No open access during allocation period.

swap_price_range.description: Price increases from p_list/4 to p_list as cumulative swaps progress

lockup_policy.description: Discounted tokens have a lockup period after TGE
lockup_policy.applies_to: Step 3 tokens only (not Step 1 listing-price tokens)

lp_reserves_at_s.description: LP reserves after cumulative swap amount s

marginal_swap_spot_price.range: Increases from 1/4 (at s=0) to 1 (at s=C/2) relative to p_list

effective_acquisition_price.description: Harmonic mean of p_list (Bucket A) and p_swap(s) (Bucket B) — equal 50/50 Pi split

effective_price_distribution.description: p_eff(s) / p_list values at evenly spaced cumulative swap fractions (s as multiple of C/2)
effective_price_distribution.x_axis_label: Cumulative ranked-swap Pi (s) [as multiple of C/2]

token_flows.staked_pi: Pioneers stake Pi → Staked Pi → released back to Pioneers
